summary: BIG_LOTTO draw 115000051 is NOT in the DB. Root cause: NO automated ingestion pipeline exists. All draw insertion is manual. Since 2026/05/05 no ingestion has been run. System-wide staleness confirmed across all lottery types.

phase3_performance_recovery.stuck_command: NONE — previous diagnostic script cancelled by user before execution (syntax error in heredoc nesting, not DB issue)
phase3_performance_recovery.root_cause_of_timeout: Script syntax error — not a DB performance problem

p2_replay_rows.note: P2B backfill applied (apply_id=P2B_20260515). P2C blocked pending draw 115000051.

other_types_with_draw_115000051.note: Different lottery type, independent draw — draw numbers are shared across types but are NOT the same event

manual_scripts.note: Main scraper — fetches draws from Taiwan Lottery official API, writes to DB via insert_draws()
Generic CSV loader — requires manual CSV download first

api_endpoints.note: Accepts list of draw objects, inserts via INSERT OR IGNORE

scheduler.task: AdvancedAutoLearningEngine optimization — strategy parameter tuning ONLY
scheduler.note: This scheduler does NOT fetch draws from external sources

smart_scheduler.note: Also does NOT fetch draws — pure ML optimization loop

github_actions.note: No CI workflow fetches draws from external source

launchd.action: Starts backend on port 8002 + frontend HTTP server on port 8081

root_cause_analysis.explanation: There is no cron job, scheduler job, GitHub Action, or background process that automatically fetches new draw results from Taiwan Lottery (https://api.taiwanlottery.com) and inserts them into lottery_v2.db. All ingestion is MANUAL — a developer must explicitly run one of the tools/ scripts or call the HTTP API with draw data.
root_cause_analysis.systemic_impact: All 4 lottery types are stale. System-wide ingestion stoppage, not BIG_LOTTO-specific.

recommended_fix_plan.action: Run tools/scrape_lottery_data.py to fetch BIG_LOTTO draws 115000051-115000053 from api.taiwanlottery.com
recommended_fix_plan.risk: LOW — read-only from external source, writes only new draws

recommended_fix_plan.action: Verify draw 115000051 inserted: re-run watcher check and DB query
recommended_fix_plan.command: python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/lottery_v2.db'); print(c.execute(\"SELECT draw, date FROM draws WHERE lottery_type='BIG_LOTTO' ORDER BY CAST(draw AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 5\").fetchall())"

recommended_fix_plan.action: Repeat for DAILY_539, POWER_LOTTO using respective upload tools
Consider adding a GitHub Actions workflow or local cron job that runs scrape_lottery_data.py nightly after draw publication time

p2c_unblock_condition: Once BIG_LOTTO draw 115000051 is ingested, run promotion engine to advance P2C items (IDs 1090-1092) from PENDING to TRUTH_CONFIRMED
